promoted_facts.fact: Waiver of punitive damages — franchisee limited to actual damages only
Waiver of class actions — neither party may litigate as class representative
Business judgment deference clause (Section 18.3) — courts/arbitrators may not substitute their judgment for franchisor's
Suspension/interim remedies available (Section 15.3) — franchisor may suspend rather than terminate
Total franchised system across all ESA brands: 129 hotels, 13,351 rooms (Dec 31 2024)
Related party overhead reimbursements to ESA Management: $6.6M in 2024 (included in G&A)
Contract liabilities (deferred revenue) increased from $4.5M to $4.8M — indicating growing franchise pipeline
Brand launch expense: $2.5M paid to existing franchisees for territory exemptions; $1.6M still accrued
Exhibit D labeling inconsistency: signed-not-open section labeled as Premier Suites rather than Select Suites
